title: Electromechanical Equipment Assemblers
description: Assemble or modify electromechanical equipment or devices, such as servomechanisms, gyros, dynamometers, magnetic drums, tape drives, brakes, control linkage, actuators, and appliances.

tasks.text: Inspect, test, and adjust completed units to ensure that units meet specifications, tolerances, and customer order requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Position, align, and adjust parts for proper fit and assembly.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble parts or units, and position, align, and fasten units to assemblies, subassemblies, or frames, using hand tools and power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Connect cables, tubes, and wiring, according to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure parts to determine tolerances, using precision measuring instruments such as micrometers, calipers, and verniers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read blueprints and specifications to determine component parts and assembly sequences of electromechanical units.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attach name plates and mark identifying information on parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Disassemble units to replace parts or to crate them for shipping.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: File, lap, and buff parts to fit, using hand and power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and lubricate parts and subassemblies, using grease paddles or oilcans.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate or tend automated assembling equipment, such as robotics and fixed automation equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drill, tap, ream, countersink, and spot-face bolt holes in parts, using drill presses and portable power drills.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate small cranes to transport or position large parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pack or fold insulation between panels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
